top_signals.title: Victims of battle of Okinawa mourned 81 years on
top_signals.summary: The Battle of Okinawa was the most savage ground battle staged in Japan during the war, and Mabuni was the site of the last fierce fighting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Hit By Tech Selloff as Korean Shares Plunge: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global stocks fell, led by steep losses in South Korea, as investors pulled back from some of this year’s top-performing tech companies on concern they’ve rallied too far.
